notes: v1.14.79 - Site-agnostic SCAN rack recognition (roadmap P1): the scanner classifier only accepted the hardcoded L-NN/R-NN pattern, silently mis-tagging any other site's racks (A01, ROW-B-03, GB300-NVL-01) as ASSET. It now also matches a scanned tag against the loaded Master's cab namespace (window._lastPhantomMaster.racksByCab, tolerant of separators/case) and returns the canonical cab key. Falls back to the L-NN/R-NN regex when no Master is loaded, so existing sites are unchanged. Multi-site correctness. (EDP/BOM parser rack-detection regexes left as a separate file-format concern.)
